Train a fresh BPE tokenizer on the synthetic corpus and expose control tokens for chat framing.
Stage one. A new byte-level BPE tokenizer is trained only on the generated text, with reserved control tokens for sequence and role markers.

The tokenizer trains from scratch on the pretraining and supervised text, producing a small vocabulary that cannot encode unseen real-world tokens. It reserves control tokens for padding, sequence boundaries, and user and assistant roles so the same tokenizer serves both pretraining and supervised finetuning.
